\tzpentry{ID3534}{Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3534 introduces Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ V_{\rm int}(x_1,x_2)=g\,\delta(x_1-x_2)\quad\Longleftrightarrow\quad V_{\rm int}(r)=g\,\delta(r). \]
